Package es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.nfc

Deprecated.
It will be no longer available in future releases.
Contains the main class that implements the communication between the cryptographic device and the NFC reader.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    NFCCommReaderFragment.FinalTaskListener
    Interface to invoke any task after NFC connectivity is established.
    NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener
    Interface to notify about events in the reading process.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    NFCCommReaderFragment Deprecated
    use Loader instead.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify
    Event type NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.ENABLE_NFC_READER NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.READER_CLOSE NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.ERROR NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.NFC_TASK_INIT NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.NFC_TASK_UPDATE NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.NFC_TASK_DONE NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.NFC_TASK_FINISHED NFCCommReaderFragment.NFCCommReaderFragmentListener.NFC_callback_notify.FINAL_TASK_INIT

Package es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.nfc Description

Contains the main class that implements the communication between the cryptographic device and the NFC reader.
